notes: CodificationIn the original, , , , provided in part that “Title I of the Economic Opportunity Act of 1964 is amended to read as follows: ‘Title II—Research and Demonstrations’ ”. Section 4 also added sections 101 to 105 to such title II of the Economic Opportunity Act of 1964.
